title: Israel says it killed Iran’s top security official, along with paramilitary boss
summary_full: Ali Larijani, Iran’s lead security official, and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani were “eliminated,” Israel said. Iran has not commented on the strikes.
summary_public: Ali Larijani, Iran’s lead security official, and Basij commander Gholamreza Soleimani were “eliminated,” Israel said. Iran has not commented on the strikes.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel says it killed Iran’s top security official
